name: ask-read-large-file
description: Agent reads a multi-line file and responds with a key line from it

files.data.log:
2024-01-01 INFO  server started
2024-01-02 WARN  disk usage at 85%
2024-01-03 ERROR connection pool exhausted
2024-01-04 INFO  backup completed
2024-01-05 INFO  server healthy
2024-01-06 WARN  memory usage high
2024-01-07 INFO  deploy v2.3.1 rolled out
2024-01-08 ERROR timeout on upstream service
2024-01-09 INFO  recovered
2024-01-10 INFO  all systems nominal

turns.user: Read data.log and tell me about any errors.

responses.text:
The log file contains two errors:
1. On 2024-01-03: "connection pool exhausted"
2. On 2024-01-08: "timeout on upstream service"
